label: swiggy_haldirams_chole_bhature
task: Set the delivery location to 'Sitabuldi, Nagpur'. Find the Haldiram's restaurant. Add one (1) plate of Chole Bhature to the cart. Report the price of that item and the total cart value (including any taxes/delivery fee shown). Do NOT proceed to checkout or place the order — stop after the item is in the cart and the cart total is visible.

label: lego_millennium_falcon_price
task: Find the LEGO Star Wars set with set number 75192 (the UCS Millennium Falcon). Report (a) the current price shown on the product page, (b) the currency, (c) whether the product is in stock or out of stock, and (d) the number of pieces. Do NOT add to cart.

label: bookmyshow_movie_in_bangalore
task: Find a movie currently running in Bangalore (Bengaluru). Pick the first movie listed under 'Now Showing' or the equivalent section. Report (a) the movie name, (b) its language, (c) its certificate (U / UA / A / etc.), and (d) the duration. Do NOT pick a show time or proceed to seat selection.

label: confirmtkt_pune_bangalore_2ac
task: Search for trains from Pune (PUNE) to Bangalore (SBC / KSR Bengaluru) for a journey date 7 days from today. From the results, find the first train that has 2A (2nd AC) availability shown as 'Available' or with a confirmed seat count. Report (a) the train name and number, (b) departure time from Pune, (c) the 2A availability status, and (d) the 2A fare. Do NOT proceed to booking.

label: redbus_ajmer_goa_count
task: Search for buses from Ajmer to Goa (Madgaon / Panaji — pick whichever Goa destination the site offers from Ajmer) for a journey date 7 days from today. After the results load, report (a) the total number of buses listed in the results, (b) the lowest fare shown across all listed buses, and (c) the name of the operator offering that lowest fare. Do NOT proceed to seat selection.

label: cleartrip_delhi_mumbai_flight
task: Search one-way flights from Delhi (DEL) to Mumbai (BOM) for a departure date 7 days from today, 1 adult, Economy class. Sort results by price (cheapest first) if a sort control is available. Report (a) the airline name of the cheapest flight shown, (b) its flight number, (c) its departure time from Delhi, (d) its arrival time at Mumbai, and (e) its total fare in INR. Do NOT proceed to passenger details or payment.

label: gemini_login_check
task: Open Gemini's web interface. Determine whether the page is showing a logged-in chat experience or a sign-in / landing page. If a sign-in is required, report exactly what the call-to-action button says (e.g., 'Sign in', 'Try Gemini'). If already logged in, report (a) the model name shown in the model picker dropdown at the top of the page (e.g., '2.5 Pro', 'Flash') and (b) whether there is an existing chat history visible in the left sidebar. Do NOT send any chat message.

label: wikipedia_alan_turing_birth
task: Use the Wikipedia search bar at the top of the page to search for 'Alan Turing'. Open the resulting article. From the infobox on the right side of the article, report (a) Alan Turing's date of birth (full date), (b) his place of birth, (c) his date of death (full date), and (d) his place of death.

label: github_anthropics_claude_code_stars
task: Use GitHub's top-bar search to search for the repository 'anthropics/claude-code'. Open the top result that matches the owner 'anthropics' and the repo 'claude-code'. From the repository page, report (a) the exact star count shown (e.g., '12.3k', '12345'), (b) the fork count, (c) the primary language listed in the right sidebar's 'Languages' section, and (d) the open-issues count shown on the 'Issues' tab. Do NOT clone, fork, or open any issues.

label: amazon_in_sony_xm5_listing
task: Use the Amazon.in search bar to search for 'Sony WH-1000XM5'. Open the first product listing that is the actual Sony WH-1000XM5 over-ear noise-cancelling headphones (skip sponsored or accessory listings). From the product detail page, report (a) the product title as shown on the page, (b) the current price in INR (the discounted price if shown, not the MRP), (c) the average customer star rating (e.g., '4.4 out of 5 stars'), and (d) the total number of customer ratings. Do NOT add to cart.
